message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #F6F2E6
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #2F6F8F
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #8FD0F0
  ActorBorderColor #2F6F8F
  ActorBackgroundColor #8FD0F0
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor transparent
}

actor "任务开始 nsq 消息" as A

participant "GuideTaskStartListener" as L
participant "GuideTaskStartProcessor" as P
participant "GuideTaskStartDomainService" as D
participant "GuideTaskStartStrategy" as S
participant "ShoppingGuideReadApi" as R
participant "GuideTaskRepository" as GR
participant "GuideTaskDataRepository" as GDR

A -> L : 1 监听任务开始消息
activate L

L -> P : 2 开始处理
activate P

P -> GR : 3 查询任务

P -> D : 4 开始任务
activate D

D -> S : 5 构建任务
activate S

S -> R : 6 根据部门查询导购
activate R

S -> R : 7 根据导购进行任务分配
R --> S
deactivate R

group Transaction
  D -> GDR : 8 保存分配给导购的任务
  D -> GR : 9 status flow 任务状态流转至 已启动
  D -> GDR : 10 任务流转为执行中
end

deactivate S
deactivate D
deactivate P
deactivate L
@enduml
